Mr. Barton stated that Rodney had offered to buy out the trust porperty or to have the trust buy him out. The Court questioned the parties as to mediation being an option. The Court denied both accountings. The court is not going to make a ruling on the removal. Both parties have agreed to mediation. The matter was referred to Pro Bono Mediation which is to be completed by 12/05/07. The matter is continued to 12/12/07 for status on the mediation. The court also ruled that the discovery motion on 09/18/07 is to go forward. No further discovery after that. The Court ordered all interested to be present at mediation.
